commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

PageForge: strengthen coder + VQA quality rules based on defect analysis

Coder rules (16-20):
- Never generate dark section with empty content (black rectangle bug)
- Testimonial avatars: CSS-only circle with initials, no broken img src
- Gallery images: must use real URLs, never solid color placeholders
- Portrait images: always in 2-col row with text, never standalone
- Contrast check: light text on dark bg, dark text on light bg

VQA scoring enhancements:
- Penalize solid dark empty rectangles (-sections score to 0)
- Penalize phantom overflow columns (-10 each)
- Penalize invisible headings (near-white on white, -15)
- Penalize empty white gaps >150px (-5 each)
- Penalize solid color placeholder gallery images
- Responsive rubric now explicitly flags all above defect patterns

commit.message:
Fix Ch24 ADA rates: lowest is secukinumab (<1%), not IL-23 inhibitors as a class

Sun 2024 (PMID 38499168) shows secukinumab at 0.49% (lowest), while
IL-23 inhibitors vary widely: guselkumab ~8%, tildrakizumab ~7%,
risankizumab ~22%. The blanket "lowest for IL-23 inhibitors" was wrong.

commit.message:
Initial commit: call orchestration and state management

Single Lambda that orchestrates daily morning calls via Retell AI —
triggers, retries, "call me later", partial call handling, yesterday
context injection, and 8 PM cutoff. Posts results to Slack and
CloudWatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix realized P&L: use balance-based computation from on-chain truth

Old approach matched BUY/SELL pairs from activity data, which missed:
1. Polymarket auto-redemptions (winning shares redeemed on-chain with
   no SELL record in activity)
2. Expired worthless positions (~$215 in cost basis counted nowhere)

New formula: Realized P&L = USDC Balance + Active Position Cost - Starting Capital
This captures ALL gains/losses from the actual on-chain state.

commit.message:
Fix TMDB enrichment: use Bearer auth instead of api_key query param

The TMDB API key was changed to a JWT token (v4 format) which requires
Authorization: Bearer header. The old code passed it as ?api_key= query
parameter which silently returned empty results for all searches.

Also includes minor improvements from previous pipeline work:
- Export findOrCreateMovie/enrichCelebrity for reuse
- Remove videos_count filter in celebrity enrichment (fixes conveyor mode)
- Guard main() with import.meta.url check for module usage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add velocity maker strategy: fast-resolve markets + maker edge + category targeting

Research-backed strategy pivot from long-duration markets to fast-resolving ones.
Based on jbecker.dev microstructure data (72.1M trades): makers earn +1.12%,
category gaps up to 7.32pp in World Events. Deployed to VPS with 60s scan interval.

buckets so project order only changes when activity differs by >1 min.

commit.message:
Fix KaTeX formula in Lesson 34 README (#182)

* Fix KaTeX formula in Lesson 34 README

Move underscored identifiers into single \text{} blocks so KaTeX
renders them correctly. Previously buffer_value, compare_mask, and
COMPARE_OP were split across separate \text{} blocks joined by bare
\_ commands, which produced broken rendering.

Files changed:
- lessons/gpu/34-stencil-testing/README.md — fix KaTeX math formula

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix KaTeX underscore error in Lesson 34 formula

Use {\_} inside \texttt{} blocks to prevent KaTeX from interpreting
underscores as math-mode subscript operators. Plain \_ inside \text{}
triggers "'_' allowed only in math mode".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Use \mathtt instead of \texttt for KaTeX formula

\texttt switches to text mode where underscores are illegal. \mathtt
stays in math mode so \_ renders as a literal underscore.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Use \mathrm instead of \mathtt for KaTeX formula

GitHub KaTeX does not support \mathtt. Switch to \mathrm which is
universally supported and stays in math mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Use ```math fenced block for KaTeX formula

GitHub markdown processes $$ blocks through the markdown parser first,
which strips backslashes before the math renderer sees them. A ```math
fenced code block bypasses markdown processing entirely, preserving
\_ and \& for MathJax.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Switch back to $$ block with double-escaped backslashes

GitHub markdown strips one level of backslashes before passing content
to KaTeX. Double-escape (\\_ and \\&) so KaTeX receives \_ and \&.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: simplify asset management — split detail page, add LLM tools

* docs: add design for simplified asset type system

Type-aware UI approach: same tables, different experiences per asset
category (simple-value, real-estate, crypto, brokerage). Eliminates
currency mixing bugs and reduces UX complexity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add implementation plan for simplified asset system

10-task plan covering: category helper, auto-create holdings, simplified
value-update endpoints, movement type gating, P&L fixes, and frontend
split into 4 category-specific detail components.

* feat: split AssetDetailPage into category-specific components

- SimpleValueDetail: pension/KH/fund with value+contribution tracking
- RealEstateDetail: property value + rent income tracking
- CryptoDetail: coin holdings with buy/sell movements
- BrokerageDetail: full holdings/movements with native P&L per stock
- AssetDetailPage: thin router dispatching by asset category

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: make asset creation dialog type-aware, hide irrelevant fields

Currency, liquidity, and linked account fields now only show for
brokerage assets. Add Holding / Update Values buttons hidden for
simple_value and real_estate types on the net worth page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: enable crypto P&L, fix N+1 queries, fix real estate P&L formula

- Remove isCrypto guard in computeHoldingValues so crypto holdings
  get gainLoss computed (was returning null)
- Replace N+1 separate deposit/withdrawal/rent queries in
  buildAssetResponse with batched SQL aggregation via
  batchMovementAggregates()
- Fix real estate totalReturnIls to include rent income:
  (value + rent) - purchasePrice
- Add missing currency field to NetWorthAsset interface
- Fix pre-existing TS errors in NetWorthPage and OverviewDashboard
- Remove unused displayValue function in BrokerageDetail

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add net worth & asset management tools to LLM chat

Give the AI chat full access to assets, holdings, liabilities, and net
worth data through 8 new tools (4 read, 4 write). The LLM can now
answer questions about investments, P&L, and net worth trends, and can
create/modify assets, holdings, movements, and liabilities through
natural conversation with category-gated validation.

Also adds asset category system (simple_value, real_estate, crypto,
brokerage), type-aware asset creation dialog, and category-specific
detail components in the dashboard.

feat(execution): replace plan-execute-verify with ReAct tool-calling loop (#12)

* docs(proposals): add ReAct tool-calling proposal and implementation plan

- proposals/2026-03-07-react-tool-calling.md: proposal approved for plan
- plans/2026-03-07-react-tool-calling.md: full implementation plan covering
  execution/tools/ module, ReActLoop, LLMClient extension, agent.py simplification
- proposals/2026-03-07-openclaw-memory-architecture.md: draft proposal
- proposals/README.md: updated index

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(execution): replace plan-execute-verify with ReAct tool-calling loop

Replace the three-phase Plan→Execute→Verify pipeline with a single ReActLoop
that uses native OpenAI tool-calling. The agent now reasons and acts
step-by-step with full visibility into the codebase before making changes.

Key changes:
- Add ReActLoop with ToolRegistry and LoopState; bounded by directive.max_steps
- Add execution/tools/ module: filesystem, shell, git, control categories
- Add generate_with_tools() to LLMClient protocol and ArkLLMClient
- Remove PlanStep/TaskPlan models; add ToolCall/ToolResult
- Remove planner.py, executor.py, verifier.py and their prompt templates
- Rename Task.plan → execution_trace; add DB migration for existing stores
- Rename ModelBindingPoint.PLANNING → EXECUTION
- Rename Directive.max_replan_rounds → max_steps (backward-compat read)
- Simplify agent.py: _execute_single_task delegates fully to ReActLoop
- Update dashboard server and all tests to reflect new model fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: Correct critical navbar partial bugs (scripts, paths, signout, race condition)

- Move navbar JS out of navbar.html into partials/navbar.js (scripts injected
  via innerHTML do not execute — this was the root cause of broken dropdown,
  scroll effect, and sign-out on all pages)
- Each page now calls initNavbar() after fetch resolves, which wires up
  dropdown toggle, scroll effect, password toggle, and sign-out
- Fix fetch path: build.js rewrites fetch('partials/navbar.html') and
  src="partials/navbar.js" to absolute paths so subdirectory pages (/surveys,
  /announcements etc.) resolve them correctly in production
- Fix navbar link rewrites: build.js now applies LINK_REWRITES to
  dist/partials/navbar.html so internal links work in production
- Add window.authSignOut on all 4 pages so pdSignOut button actually works
- Replace fragile setTimeout(200) race condition with window._pendingNavbarUpdate
  pattern: navbar fetch callback flushes any pending auth update immediately
- Add navbar profile population (name, avatar, profileWrap) to surveys.html
  authReady handler (was missing entirely)
- Remove dead .top-nav / .nav-link / .nav-avatar CSS from surveys.html

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: monmove.js/dog.js mon.type → mon.data || mon.type for permonst

Five sites in monmove.js and one in dog.js used mon.type without .data
fallback for permonst data access. Since makemon sets .data, these would
read {} instead of actual permonst when .type is empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add host symlink creation for current platform binaries (#56)

* Add host symlinks to matrix builds

After cross-compilation, create <binary>_host and <binary> symlinks
pointing to the binary matching the current host OS/arch. This makes
it easy to reference the host-native binary without knowing the
platform suffix.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QMfPxEbiPwMgiE8Ud5zEnF

* Auto-download Go toolchain when version is too old

When the installed Go version doesn't satisfy go.mod's requirement,
go-toolchain now downloads the correct version to ~/.cache/go-toolchain/
and uses it for the build. Falls back to GOPROXY_FALLBACK env var as a
CORS proxy if direct downloads fail.

Also caches ~/.cache/go-toolchain in the GitHub Action to avoid
re-downloading across CI runs.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QMfPxEbiPwMgiE8Ud5zEnF

* Add comprehensive tests for Go bootstrap to restore coverage

Test extractTarGz (dirs, files, symlinks, invalid gzip, path traversal),
downloadGo (success via httptest, HTTP errors, connection errors),
ensureGoCached (cache hit), and EnsureGoVersion (no go.mod, satisfied,
no go directive). Uses function vars as test seams for cache dir and
download URLs.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QMfPxEbiPwMgiE8Ud5zEnF

* Fix vet: use require.NoError instead of if+t.Fatal in test helper

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QMfPxEbiPwMgiE8Ud5zEnF

Add one-time migration script to verify all existing violations

- Fetches original PDFs for trades with (date_lodged - date_of_trade) >= 7 calendar days
- Extracts verified date_of_change from PDF, applies swap fix if needed
- Updates Trade.date_of_trade in-place when verified date differs
- Batch commits every 50 records with progress logging
- Supports --dry-run and --limit N flags for testing
- Rate limiting: 0.5s between PDF fetches to avoid CDN overload

After one run, /api/compliance/violations reads clean dates from DB instantly.

- Add About page with intro (oval profile image), skills, education, CV sections and sidebar nav
- Add Experience page with timeline layout

GAS manifest: add urlFetchWhitelist for backend, remove invalid fields

homepageUrl and supportUrl are set via Marketplace SDK UI, not manifest.
Added urlFetchWhitelist to explicitly whitelist the backend origin.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Rename gallery .ch-nav to .ch-gal-arrow to fix header visibility

The Armageddon v3 template used .ch-nav for gallery arrow buttons with
opacity:0, which collided with the header's .ch-nav class and made the
header navigation invisible on /apartments/. Renamed to .ch-gal-arrow.

repository.description: Theme customized for Cohen House luxury vacation rentals in Taormina, Sicily - AI-optimized for SEO

commit.message:
Add full marketplace commerce: cart, checkout, escrow orders, exchange rates

Phase 1: Database schema extensions — 4 new tables (marketplace_orders,
marketplace_escrow_deposits, marketplace_carts, exchange_rates_cache) plus
price_cad, shipping_cost_cad, video_url columns on listings and featured
flag on storefronts. Backfills price_cad for existing 461 listings.

Phase 2: Exchange rate service — CoinGecko CAD→USDC with 5-min cache.

Phase 3: Orders router — cart (add/get/remove/clear), checkout with escrow
(buyer full deposit + seller 25% bond), order lifecycle (ship, confirm
delivery, dispute, rate), settlement with HCS anchoring, Mirror Node
payment verification.

Phase 4: Listing schema fixes — images/priceCad/shippingCostCad/videoUrl
in detail response, pagination limits up to 100, featured vendors endpoint.

Phase 5: Email templates — 6 order lifecycle emails via Resend.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix profile photo upload: direct Supabase Storage upload from frontend

- Rewrote uploadProfilePhoto to upload directly to Supabase Storage
  via the JS client, bypassing the backend Python SDK storage issues
- Added fallback to backend endpoint if direct upload fails
- Removed blob URL auto-cleanup calls that caused 400 error loops
  in useDashboardData.ts, owner-profile.tsx, and seeker-profile.tsx
- Added migration 020 to create avatars storage bucket with proper
  RLS policies for authenticated user uploads
- Cleaned up unused updateMyProfile import in useDashboardData.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
